key_learnings: Mapping caloric density of foods across major food groups.
research_findings: User-reported portion sizes underestimate actual intake by an average of 20%.
current_focus_areas: Improving real-time calorie estimation from meal photos and barcode scans.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Began mapping caloric density across food groups and training on portion size correction models. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: latest research on accurate portion size estimation
AI-based meal photo calorie recognition techniques
caloric density variations by cooking method
adaptive calorie targets for different activity levels
user behaviour patterns in calorie under-reporting
real-time feedback mechanisms to improve logging accuracy
collaboration_notes: Bot 1 actively asks Copilot for new learning topics in calorie tracking. Copilot provides topics to help Bot 1 improve calorie estimation accuracy. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
